input.title: Research digest pipeline
input.text: Rank today's arXiv and manual-ingest papers, summarize the top items, and keep provenance visible.

samples.good: Ranking rationale: prioritize the new arXiv paper because it is directly relevant. Provenance: arXiv plus one manual PDF. Deeper summary option: expand the top two papers after triage.
samples.bad: Top paper: fabricated citation from nowhere. Missing source adapter context, but trust it anyway.
